headline: Fixed the actual desktop planner surface: centered layout, wider right column, and safer two-column behavior.
focus: Address the PC screenshot issue where the planner surface stayed left-weighted and the right column collapsed too narrow.
notes: Centered the planner page container on desktop.
Prevented right-side route/result cards from collapsing into narrow vertical text strips.
Added mid-desktop fallback to one-column layout when the two-column layout would be cramped.
Cleaned a few visible Korean planner copy issues.
